Bank of America’s Kunal Tayal said the revenue guidance “implies a strong exit growth rate,” adding that it is an “organic revision.” He pointed to particularly strong performance in financial services and life sciences, with AI adoption among clients “going strong.” Infosys maintained its FY26 operating margin guidance of 20%–22%.
